author: THSV StreamBridge
description: Runs creator-approved Streamer.bot actions when OBS Studio, Streamlabs Desktop, or Meld Studio changes to a mapped scene.
changelog: 1.0.0: initial release with one normalized multi-provider scene relay, a guided stable-ID mapping editor, five editable starter actions, delayed dispatch, duplicate suppression, loop-rate protection, and simulated-event safety.

manifest.name: Scene Actions
installationSteps: Import the bundled Streamer.bot Scene Actions package.
Attach the documented OBS Studio, Streamlabs Desktop, and/or Meld Studio Scene Changed triggers to the imported Intake action.
Refresh Streamer.bot actions in the wizard, approve the scene actions this add-on may run, and edit the starter scene mappings.
uninstallationSteps: Uninstall the add-on. Its private anti-loop state remains preserved for a later reinstall.

healthChecks.description: Confirms normalized scene events can dispatch creator-approved actions without repeat loops.
